scripts.setup: yarn --cwd packages/mini-harness install --frozen-lockfile && yarn --cwd packages/workshop-harness install --frozen-lockfile && yarn --cwd apps/pocket-cinema install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.typecheck: yarn --cwd packages/mini-harness typecheck && yarn --cwd packages/workshop-harness typecheck && yarn --cwd apps/pocket-cinema typecheck
scripts.test: yarn --cwd packages/mini-harness test && yarn --cwd packages/workshop-harness test && yarn --cwd apps/pocket-cinema test
scripts.verify: yarn typecheck && yarn test && yarn check:workshop
